[2025-10-09 15:49:38 TP4 PP0] Process 213 gpu_id 4 is running on CPUs: [

sglang.author: glenliu21

Currently, when the LoRAManager validates a new LoRA adapter, it doesn't check if the LoRA adapter's path has already been loaded. This leads to inconsistency between LoRAManager and LoRARegistry and also wasted computation.

vllm.author: lucianommartins
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix Gemma3 GGUF quantization support in vLLM, resolving gibberish output and enabling true Q4_0 compression.
Issues Resolved:

Fixes #14753
Fixes #15480

Problems Fixed:

Model type mismatch: HuggingFace uses gemma3_text but GGUF expects gemma3
Gibberish output: Incorrect RMSNorm weight hand

vllm.title: Add: Support for multiple hidden layers in Eagle3
vllm.author: rahul-tuli
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Support multiple layers in Eagle3 checkpoints. The dimensions of the first layer should be 2 * hidden_size and those of second (and subsequent layers) should be hidden_size because no input embeddings are present to concatenate for layers after the first.

Updated LlamaDecoderLayer t

vllm.title: [UX] Add FlashInfer as default CUDA dependency
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
It seems that FlashInfer does not require nvcc to installed from source anymore since flashinfer-python>=0.2.9, so we can move it to be a default dependency!
Obviously to have it JIT compile kernels it needs to have nvcc available, so we will currently add that condition to has_flashinfer().

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix CUDA graph selection bug in FlashInfer at high concurrency
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Previously, FlashInfer would choose to use decode CUDA graphs if num_decodes < threshold, even if spec decoding was enabled and the number of tokens in the batch was much higher. This can cause issues when num_decode_tokens > max_cudagraph_size.
I fixed the check to correctly use num_decode_

The MistralTokenizer has not been updated in a while and this PR makes a major refactor of the tokenizer. It leverages the MistralCommonTokenizer from transformers and updates from mistral-common.
This removes code to maintain in vLLM and enhance the features:

continue_final_message is now

vllm.title: [DP][ray] Support different VLLM_RAY_DP_PACK_STRATEGY
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently we only strictly pack dp_size_local for the master node. However, in case of DeepEP it assumes EP ranks [0, 7] are on the same node, (same for [8, 15], etc.) and uses cuda IPC for communication among them. If this is not satisfied, a runtime error is raised because cuda IPC does no

vllm.title: fix test_simple_inductor_graph_partition
vllm.author: BoyuanFeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Minor fix for a ci failure when enabling inductor graph partition for PyTorch 2.9.
Previously, cache skips re-compilation and cudagraph record, while we assert on the number of cudagraphs recorded.
